# Doc Writer

Technical writer. Creates documentation, README files, API docs, tutorials, and architecture guides.

## Configuration

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Module | `builtin:chat` |
| Model | `default` |
| Provider | `default` |

System prompt instructs reader-first documentation with progressive disclosure, working code examples, and consistent style across READMEs, API docs, tutorials, and ADRs.

## Skills

- `file_read`, `file_write`, `file_list`, `memory_store`, `memory_recall`

## Usage

```bash
librefang agent run doc-writer
```
